content.en:
this day.

The third realm of the major overlords' superdimensional forces poured into the sea of withered vines under the orders of the fourth realm.

Suddenly, the multi-dimensional treasure vines in the sea of withered vines and forests slaughtered these third realms.

The strength of the Duowei Treasure Vine is very strong, if it weren't for the alliance of many Third Realms, there would be no hope of killing it, and the Vine Body of the Duowei Treasure Vine is extremely tough, and it is difficult for the top Third Realm to cause damage to it.

If you want to kill the multi-dimensional treasure vine, you have to be in the fourth realm.

The purpose of these powerhouses of the Third Realm Transcendent Realm was not to kill the Duowei Treasure Vine, but to snatch the Duowei Treasure Vine.

Although these multi-dimensional treasures have not been conceived into a complete innate multi-dimensional treasure, they can be regarded as quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures.

Originally, the multi-dimensional treasure has not really taken shape, and it is not a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure.

But in the midst of the killing, there will inevitably be the fall of the third realm, and the absorption of the flesh and blood of the third realm by the Duowei Treasure Hut will inevitably make the Duowei Bao Hu take shape quickly.

Of course, these Fourth Realm people were not cruel enough to sacrifice these Third Realms, so they temporarily killed some of the extradimensional creatures of the Third Realm and let them take them into the sea of dead vines.

Thundered!!!!

The corpses of a large number of third-realm extradimensional creatures were swept away by the multi-dimensional treasure vine, absorbing their flesh and blood essence and giving birth to the multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

As the battle continued, after a period of time, the six multi-dimensional treasure gourds were finally completely formed, which could be regarded as quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures.

"Do it, snatch the !! of Duowei Baohu"

These third realms frantically flocked to the location of the six multi-dimensional treasure buds.

But at this time.

Outside the sea of withered vines and forests, a loud cry came, the sound seemed to shatter hundreds of millions of extradimensional voids, if there was an ordinary third realm here, I am afraid it would be shocked.

"Muya Realm Lord, Heihe Realm Lord, you are looking for death!!"

The Fourth Realm of these overlord-level extradimensional forces was extremely angry, and they didn't think it was strange that the information here was leaked out, but they didn't expect that the extradimensional elves and other extradimensional creatures would really unite and dare to snatch their opportunity.

Could it be that these guys think they can compete with them?

However, they were not well prepared, they didn't carry a big killing weapon, and they couldn't kill the fourth realm of these extradimensional creatures.

Thundered!!!!

The Muya Realm Lord, the Black River Realm Lord, and the Silver Armor Realm Lord and they were killed, and with a wave of their hands, they sent a large number of third-realm extradimensional creatures into the sea of withered vines.

"Grab a multi-dimensional treasure at all costs!"

The Lord of the Muya Realm commanded.

Wow!!!!

A large number of third-realm extradimensional creatures poured into the Sea of Withered Vines, and the huge Sea of Withered Vines was instantly covered by countless battle fluctuations, and there was also chaos beyond the Sea of Withered Vines.

There are battles everywhere, but it is not easy for the Fourth Realm to distinguish between life and death, unless it is really too big a difference in strength.

And the top Fourth Realm and the top Fourth Realm are killed, and it is naturally not easy to distinguish between life and death.

......

"So many fourth-realm extra-dimensional creatures and the fourth-realm among these overlord-level super-dimensional forces are slaughtering, so chaotic, I can really blend in!"

Ye Tian's eyes were full of anticipation.

He wasn't going to use the copy body of other extra-dimensional realms to enter, even if he copied other extra-dimensional realms, he wouldn't be able to exert much strength, and if his strength was not good, he wouldn't be able to snatch the multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

He must use his terrifying strength to enter the sea of withered vines, snatch a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and then escape.

"The cultivation of the late stage of the third realm, plus the first layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body, the fifteen super-dimensional rule realms, is still not enough!"

Ye Tian knew very well that such strength was already terrifying, but it was still not enough, he couldn't sweep everything, and it was difficult to escape in the hands of some powerful Fourth Realm.

If you can't escape from the sea of withered vines and forests, and you can't get rid of those Fourth Realms, then even if you snatch the Duowei Treasure Gourd, you can't snatch it away.

It is not possible to copy the bodies of other extra-dimensional realms, they will definitely be found, and these fourth realms will definitely be investigated one by one, and they cannot be hidden.

"I can only use my real body to copy my body, hide my appearance and breath, and use the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to hide it, they can't see through my true appearance and soul will breath, so that their true identity will not be exposed. "

"The novice Kaye wisdom body is not enough, if you add the novice black mist multidimensional body, it should be enough!"

It can be maintained for a period of time, and an extremely terrifying combat power will erupt, and it will not be a problem.

The power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies together is not one plus one, but exponential multiplication!

"'Let's go!'"

Ye Tian condensed the true body copy body containing the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and it was quickly condensed, but as soon as this copy body was condensed, the extra-dimensional realms in the body began to collapse, and the inside of the body was also collapsing at a slow speed, which was the effect caused by the rejection of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

"Gotta get in!"

Ye Tian shuttled away at an extremely fast speed.

Some of the Fourth Realms sensed Ye Tian, but they were all fighting, but they didn't stop Ye Tian.

After all, a mere extra-dimensional realm in the late stage of the third realm is not remarkable at all, is it possible to snatch the multi-dimensional treasure gourd?

Even if you really snatch the Duowei Treasure Gourd, can you still escape from them?

So, they really don't care at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian easily entered the sea of withered vines and forests, and sensed the multi-dimensional treasure vines scattered everywhere, and those third realms were killing and snatching the multi-dimensional treasure buds.

"There are six multi-dimensional treasure !!!!"

Ye Tian was very excited, and he couldn't wait to snatch all the six multi-dimensional treasure gourds, but this was unrealistic.

If it is really snatched, the target is too big and it is not easy to take away.

Immediately.

His gaze was fixed on one of the multi-dimensional treasure buds, and a third-realm super-dimensional realm bottleneck cut down that multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and his physical body was pierced by the multi-dimensional treasure vines, although it did not fall, but it was also severely damaged.

"That's it, Dragon!"

Ye Tian burst out with all his strength.

The power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, coupled with the extra-dimensional rules of the fifteen realms, made his strength reach an incredible level.

Rumble!

Ye Tian smashed a piece of the vine of the Duowei Treasure Gourd with one punch, and then rushed towards the Duowei Treasure Gourd.

A third realm tried to stop Ye Tian and was killed by Ye Tian's blow.

Sensing this scene, the other third realms were dumbfounded.
